template_structure.content_requirements: H1 with the project name followed by a single-sentence tagline. Optionally include a badge line (CI, license, version) only if those assets actually exist for this project.

2-4 sentences describing what the project does, the problem it solves, and the primary audience. This is what the reader sees first after the tagline; it must be self-contained enough to let them decide whether to keep reading.

Minimal prerequisites and the fastest path to a working setup. Show the install command(s) and whatever single command proves the install worked. Keep this section short; deeper setup belongs in a dedicated optional section added per SKILL.md guidance.
Smallest demonstration of actually invoking the project: one code block or one-line example. Cover the single most important workflow. Link out to further examples rather than expanding here.
One-line license statement with a link to the LICENSE file.
